name: PrinceFarmer
basePrompt: modern pixel art, 16x24 character sprite, limited 16-color palette, warm earth tones (browns/reds/golds), dark fantasy Filipino, painted-by-Frank-Solleveld-style pixel polish, no anti-aliasing, hard pixel edges
heroNotes: bare-chested Filipino warrior, red headband with trailing cloth, dark hair, gold earrings and arm bands, intricate tribal tattoos on chest and arms, red-and-white woven wrap around waist, bare feet, lean muscular build, fierce expression
weaponNotes: Filipino kampilan (curved single-edged sword with elaborate hilt) and traditional round shield with red tassels, wooden spear
monsterNotes: Filipino folklore creatures, distinctive silhouettes, glowing eyes for horror
environmentNotes: stone temple platforms overgrown with vines, deep jungle greens, dappled light
